identity.name: Browser — Cross-Origin SaaS Copy-Paste DLP
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-004. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1567. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-004. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1567. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-BROWSER-004.
UC: Cross-SaaS Data Movement Detection / TC: User Copies from Sanctioned CRM, Pastes Into Personal Webmail.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-BROWSER-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm browser_attack_runner plugin is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe browser_attack_runner \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'
# step-2: Drive Prisma Browser: copy from CRM, paste into webmail
cat > /tmp/sim-browser-004-eal.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-BROWSER-004
name: "Browser — cross-origin DLP"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - crm.cortexsim-test.invalid
  - mail.cortexsim-test.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [browser, dlp, cross-origin]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: browser_attack_runner
    params:
      campaign_path: scenarios/browser/campaigns/saas-cross-origin-dlp.yml
      allowlist_host: crm.cortexsim-test.invalid
      browser_channel: prisma
      headless: true
      timeout_seconds: 120.0
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/sim-browser-004-eal.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm PB → XSIAM stitched alert
echo "[CortexSim] Confirm XSIAM stitched incident: clipboard-origin mismatch."

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-03)
